segments.text: With a percent lead, MASA can really take his time and play it safe
segments.original_text: パーセントリードしている状況はMASAさんがじっくり見れる

segments.text: Reflects it back with Falco Vision there
segments.original_text: ちょっとここでファルコビジョン通し返しましたよ

segments.text: Looks like they're just reading, then BAM, rushing in with Vision
segments.original_text: なんか見てると思ったら一気に突っ込んでくるんですよねこの人ビジョンで

segments.text: Great platform control without jumping straight up
segments.original_text: うまく上にブロックを置くところにも垂直にはジャンプせずに

full_text: With a percent lead, MASA can really take his time and play it safe Yeah, that's right Reflects it back with Falco Vision there Exactly Looks like they're just reading, then BAM, rushing in with Vision What's next? Great platform control without jumping straight up Took it clean

corrections.reason: プレイヤー名MASAの表記統一
ファルコビジョン（リフレクター）で通し返す

corrections.original: 口にネタを置くところ
corrections.corrected: 上にブロックを置くところ
corrections.reason: Steve対策のブロック配置の話
